summary: Iter27 — Test of 3 new features: (1) DocumentiMancanti dashboard widget, (2) standalone /libro-matricola page, (3) 3rd 'Storico avvisi inviati' tab in /avvisi. Backend pytest: 9/9 PASS on test_iter27_documenti_mancanti_libro_matricola.py covering /api/insights/documenti-mancanti, /api/libro-matricola (with q + stato filters), /api/storico-avvisi (no 401 admin) + /storico-avvisi/registra extra fields acceptance, voucher regression. Frontend Playwright: all critical data-testid present (docs-missing-widget + 3 cards, libro-matricola-page + lm-search + lm-stato, tab-avvisi-storico + storico-tab + storico-canale + storico-search). Sidebar has new entries 'Libro Matricola' and 'Corsi IVASS · 30h'. End-to-end integration verified: the test POST to /storico-avvisi/registra appeared in the Storico tab table immediately.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' — accessibility a11y, non-blocking, add DialogDescription or aria-describedby

Sticky header CSS could not be verified because the table is not rendered in empty state (only 'Nessuna applicazione registrata' message is shown). When data is present the sticky behavior should be re-tested. RECOMMENDATION: render a minimal table skeleton + sticky thead even in empty state, or add an explicit data-testid='lm-table' wrapper for tests.

action_items: (Optional UI a11y) Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to DialogContent in DocumentiMancantiWidget and other dashboard dialogs to remove console accessibility warnings.

(Optional) Seed at least 1 sample applicazione_matricola so the Libro Matricola table can be visually tested (sticky header, row docs button). Currently table is empty in seed DB so the lm-docs-{id} button could not be exercised.
critical_code_review_comments: extras_p1p2.py:67-73 — veicolo_filter merges pol_filter then adds '$and' for targa; but pol_filter already has '$or' for effetto. Mixing top-level $or with $and works in MongoDB but is fragile. OK functionally (test passed).

extras_p1p2.py:239-241 — when both `q` and `stato==attivo` are passed, the second $or assignment overwrites the first (no targa filter applied + stato filter loses precedence). Use $and to combine both. Low priority (UI doesn't combine them simultaneously today).

extras_p1p2.py:258-260 — `n_allegati` is computed with N+1 count_documents queries inside a loop. For large libro matricola lists this becomes O(N) DB roundtrips. Use aggregation $lookup or single find with grouping.
extras_p1p2.py:625-626 — duplicate `if anagrafica_id:` lines (set + setdefault on the same key). Harmless but suggests copy-paste; remove redundant line.

success_rate.frontend: 100% all required data-testid present and integrations working

seed_data_creation: 1 storico_avviso record persisted (canale=whatsapp, soggetto=TEST_iter27_<hex>) — not cleaned up, visible in Storico avvisi tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iter27 features verified end-to-end. Backend test file is test_iter27_documenti_mancanti_libro_matricola.py. Endpoint /api/insights/documenti-mancanti returns totali polizze=200/veicoli=200/anagrafiche=200 in current seed DB. /api/libro-matricola returns [] (empty applicazioni_matricola collection). /api/storico-avvisi works for admin (no 401). /api/storico-avvisi/registra accepts extra fields via Pydantic extra='allow'. Frontend Dashboard renders DocumentiMancantiWidget above stats with 3 clickable cards opening Radix dialogs. Sidebar has 'Libro Matricola' (/libro-matricola) and 'Corsi IVASS · 30h' (/corsi-ivass) entries. Page /libro-matricola has lm-search input and lm-stato Select; lm-docs-{id} button could not be exercised because table is empty. /avvisi has 3 tabs: tab-avvisi-titoli (default), tab-avvisi-polizze, tab-avvisi-storico (NEW). New tab content shows storico-canale + storico-search filters and a table (storico-tab) of historical sends, including the iter27 test record posted via API. Iter26 regressions are NOT in scope of this run but spot-check of /api/voucher succeeded (200, list shape).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter27 scope.
